x4freetext: For short-lived fission products, nitrate solutions
of 235U (~2 ug) were sealed in polypropylene tubes.
For long-lived fission products, an electrodeposited
target of 235U (~100 ug) was covered with
0.075-mm-thick Lexan foils and then sealed with
All samples were wrapped with 1-mm-thick cadmium foil.
For short-lived fission products targets were
irradiated for 1-10 min at a flux of
1.2 X 10**12 n/cm2/sec. For long-lived fission products
